prompt: Premium cinematic Chinese xianxia novel cover background. In the age of dying spiritual energy, a lone young male cultivator stands on a black cliff in a worn gray outer-sect robe, facing a ruptured dark sky. Above the ancient mountains, a radiant ancient causality seed glows like a divine sun, surrounded by broken rune rings and golden fate-lines cracking heaven itself. The mood is majestic, oppressive, mysterious, and expensive, like a top-tier professionally designed fantasy cover. Obsidian black, midnight blue, antique gold, pale celestial white. No text, no watermark, no logo.
scene: ancient mountain sect at dusk under a broken heaven in the end-of-dharma era
subject: a lone male cultivator seen from mid-distance, slim and sharp, plain gray robe, facing the sky, with a subtle broken jade pendant detail
style: cinematic premium fantasy illustration, highly polished, commercially professional Chinese web novel cover art
composition: vertical cover composition, strong central focus, vast sky, hero in lower third, elegant negative space for title placement at top
lighting: divine gold light piercing through dark storm clouds, dramatic rim light, moody atmosphere
palette: obsidian black, deep midnight blue, antique gold, celestial white
materials: ancient stone, storm clouds, divine energy, rune fragments, silk robe texture
constraints: must feel premium, epic, serious, and high-end; no cartoon style; no extra characters; no readable text
negative: blurry face, cheap poster look, anime, low detail, flat lighting, busy clutter, neon cyberpunk, watermark

prompt: Luxury Chinese xianxia book cover background with immense atmosphere. A young male cultivator named Ning Chen is the only figure, standing under a towering bronze heavenly gate torn open by violet lightning and golden causality threads. He is a fallen outer disciple from Qingyun Sect, wearing a simple damaged gray robe, carrying an air of hidden ruthlessness and destiny. The sky is fractured by an ancient dao seed awakening, like the universe has cracked. Ancient mountain silhouettes, abyssal clouds, divine symbols, subtle chessboard-like fate lines. The visual should feel like a blockbuster fantasy key art made by a professional design studio. No text, no watermark.
scene: ancient sect mountains, abyss, heavenly gate, broken sky, end-of-dharma era
subject: single male cultivator, back view or side view, slim young man, plain outer disciple robe, sharp silhouette
style: epic Chinese fantasy key art, premium publishing cover, painterly realism
composition: dramatic vertical poster, colossal sky object in upper half, lone hero small but powerful in lower third
lighting: dark environment with concentrated gold and violet celestial light, strong contrast, volumetric rays
palette: black, deep blue, antique gold, muted violet, pale white
materials: bronze gate, fractured stone, divine energy, rune dust, mountain mist
constraints: must look elite and expensive, not generic, not game splash art, no extra crowd, no text
negative: low resolution, soft focus, cheesy fantasy, oversaturated colors, modern clothing, smiling expression, watermark

prompt: Ultra-premium eastern fantasy novel cover background. Theme: the weak outer disciple becomes the one who plays the game of heaven. Show a lone teenage male cultivator on dangerous stone steps or a narrow cliff path, gazing toward a celestial causality orb splitting the void above Qingyun Sect. The world is in spiritual decline; the atmosphere should carry despair, ambition, secrecy, and fate. Use broken golden causality lines in the sky like shattered destiny, ancient mountains below, a sense of sect politics and forbidden inheritance. The image must feel elegant, restrained, elite, and masterfully art-directed, suitable for a bestselling Chinese web novel cover. No text, no watermark.
scene: Qingyun Sect mountains at twilight in a dying spiritual age
subject: one male cultivator only, plain gray robe, small figure but unforgettable presence
style: high-end cinematic fantasy painting, premium cover illustration, refined and dramatic
composition: vertical 2:3 poster-like framing with generous top space for title, layered depth, clean silhouette
lighting: celestial gold core light against dark blue storm sky, subtle violet energy veins, controlled contrast
palette: obsidian, midnight blue, antique gold, moonlit white, restrained violet
materials: weathered stone steps, silk robe, storm mist, ancient runes, celestial fractures
constraints: must feel sophisticated and commercially polished, not busy, not cute, no text, no female characters
negative: anime face, cheap mobile game art, clutter, exaggerated muscles, bright rainbow colors, watermark
